name: Simple- Honest Potato Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the grated potatoes, sliced onions, grated carrots, salt, and pepper.
2. Stir in the cream and butter until well combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a pudding dish that has been generously greased with butter.
4. Dot the top of the pudding with additional butter.
5. Cover the dish and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes.
6. Uncover the dish and continue baking for another 15 minutes, or until a light golden crust forms on top.
